prompt: An original dark-fantasy striker unit called Rift Lens: an arcane scholar-archer wearing layered violet robes and light arcane armor plating, a floating rift-lens focus orb hovering beside their shoulder, drawing a bow made of crackling purple/violet arcane energy, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear weapon/prop silhouette, agile poised archer stance, dynamic cold violet energy rim lighting, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
